page_header.title: 'Fiduciary Policies' with Scale icon
page_header.description: Define Trust Mandates that govern how your agents can spend

draft_alert_banner.message: X draft policies pending review - Review each draft Trust Mandate and click 'Activate & Lock' to begin enforcement

policy_cards.purpose_field: Shows 'Purpose: X' when purpose is set
policy_cards.status_badges: Draft (amber), Active (green with lock icon), Archived (gray)

step1_basics_purpose.purpose_presets: Marketing, Engineering, Operations, Research, Procurement buttons
step1_basics_purpose.purpose_input: Free-form text input for custom purpose

step2_amount_thresholds.dual_slider_visualization: Visual bar showing auto-approve vs human-review zones
step2_amount_thresholds.spending_limits: Per Transaction, Daily, Weekly, Monthly limit inputs

step3_restrictions.vendor_restrictions: Allowed vendors and blocked vendors inputs
step3_restrictions.category_restrictions: Allowed categories and blocked categories inputs
step3_restrictions.time_window: Active days buttons (Mon-Sun), Start/End hour dropdowns, Timezone dropdown

step4_review_activate.activate_policy: Creates policy with status=active and is_locked=true

edit_policy.pre_filled_data: Existing policy data is loaded into form

terminology.trust_mandate: Used in explanatory text and callouts

critical_code_review_comments: FiduciaryPoliciesPage.js is well-structured with proper component separation (StatsCard, PolicyCard, PolicyWizard, etc.)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Purpose presets are correctly implemented with free-form text fallback
Dual-slider visualization uses colored inputs and visual bar (not actual slider inputs as noted)
Backend policies.js correctly handles purpose field in create/update/get operations
Lock/unlock functionality properly enforces edit restrictions
seed_data_creation: Created test policies during backend testing (cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fiduciary Policy Engine UX fully tested. All 4 wizard steps work correctly. Backend API supports purpose field. Lock/unlock functionality enforces edit restrictions. Stats cards update correctly. Draft alert banner shows when drafts exist. Policy cards display purpose and threshold tags correctly.
